title: BEM-1151 curator router
objective:
Create file governance/runners/curator_router.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

PASSPORTS = Path("governance/objects/object_passports.json")


def load_objects():
    data = json.loads(PASSPORTS.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return {item["id"]: item for item in data.get("objects", [])}


def route(contour, role):
    objects = load_objects()
    curator_id = f"CUR-{contour}"
    curator = objects.get(curator_id)
    if not curator:
        return {"ok": False, "error": "curator not found"}
    if role not in ["analyst", "auditor", "worker"]:
        return {"ok": False, "error": "unsupported contour role"}
    return {"ok": True, "curator": curator_id, "contour": contour, "role": role, "channel": "managed_channel"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    contour = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else ""
    role = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else ""
    result = route(contour, role)
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
